tagline: Changing our clients' lives by changing the way they live outdoors.

hero.headline:
Your Outdoor Dream, Built to Last
for Generations
hero.subheadline: For nearly 50 years, the Farrell family has been transforming backyards across northwest Ohio into outdoor living spaces families actually use. From landscape design to pool installation, patios to lighting -- we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy your yard.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Landscaping<br class="hidden md:block"> From Design to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors for your outdoor projects. Farrell's handles everything under one roof -- design, build, plant, and maintain -- so your property looks stunning year-round.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Custom landscape plans brought to life with premium plants, trees, and garden beds. We design around your property, your lifestyle, and your vision.

cards.title: Paver Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: Unilock-certified patio, walkway, and retaining wall installation. From flagstone to pavers, we build outdoor surfaces that last decades.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Complete outdoor kitchens, pergolas, and custom living areas designed for entertaining. Your backyard becomes the favorite room in your home.

cards.title: Pool Installation
cards.description: Inground and fiberglass pool installation with surrounding landscaping and patio integration. From concept to first splash, we handle everything.

cards.title: Lawn Care & Fertilization
cards.description: Comprehensive mowing, fertilization, weed control, aeration, and overseeding. Your lawn stays thick, green, and healthy all season long.

cards.title: Snow Removal & Plowing
cards.description: Reliable commercial and residential snow plowing, blowing, and ice management. We keep your property safe and accessible all winter.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Collaborate on Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your outdoor goals. We'll visit your property, listen to your ideas, and create a custom design plan -- all with a free, no-pressure consultation.

steps.title: We Build It Right
steps.description: Our certified crew brings your vision to life with premium materials, expert craftsmanship, and clean job sites. We keep you informed every step of the way.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Living
steps.description: Your new outdoor space is ready to share with family and friends. Plus, every project comes with our 5-year workmanship warranty for total peace of mind.

about.label: Why Northwest Ohio Trusts Farrell's
about.headline: Two Generations of Craftsmanship, One Family's Promise
about.description: Founded in 1976 by Tony and Wendy Farrell, our company is now proudly led by the next generation -- Clayton and Katelynn Farrell. With over 3,000 projects completed across northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana, we bring nearly 50 years of expertise to every job. From our garden center to our design studio, everything is under one roof so your project is seamless from start to finish.

features.title: ICPI & Unilock Certified Crews
features.description: Our installers hold industry-leading certifications, ensuring your hardscape and landscape projects meet the highest professional standards.

features.title: 5-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: Every project is backed by our 5-year warranty. If something is not right, we come back and fix it -- no questions asked.

features.title: Full-Service, One Company
features.description: Design, installation, garden center, and ongoing maintenance all under one roof. No subcontractors, no finger-pointing, just accountability.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-quoted based on your property and goals. We provide detailed proposals so you know exactly what you're getting.

guarantee.headline: Our 5-Year Workmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our work does not meet your expectations, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. Every project is backed by our 5-year workmanship warranty -- because we stand behind the quality of our craftsmanship long after the job is done.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 2-4 weeks depending on scope and season. For lawn care and maintenance services, we can typically start within a week. Contact us to discuss your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you serve the Toledo area?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have two locations serving Bryan and Toledo. Our service area covers all of northwest Ohio and northeast Indiana, including Defiance, Napoleon, Maumee, Holland, Swanton, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: What certifications do your installers hold?
faqs.answer: Our team holds ICPI Concrete Paver Installer and Unilock Authorized Contractor certifications. We also maintain a BBB A+ rating and are members of the Ohio Landscape Association. All crews are licensed and insured.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer full lawn care, fertilization, mulching, bush trimming, and seasonal cleanup services. Many of our clients have trusted us with their property maintenance for 8+ years running.

faqs.question: Can I visit your garden center?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our garden center and greenhouse in Bryan is open to the public. We carry plants, flowers, trees, soil, gravel, seasonal items, and our staff is always happy to offer expert gardening advice.

testimonials.name: David J.
testimonials.text: My wife and I are very happy with the service. Clayton is very personable and understanding. Juan and Orlando did an amazing job with the patio. Now the mound in our front yard has been leveled and hydro seeded. We are looking forward to a nice lawn.

testimonials.name: Cynthia C.
testimonials.text: Clayton and Kevin were great. They went above and beyond. We are very pleased with the unique design and ultimate appearance. They checked in with us often and remained attentive to our needs. Would use them again.

testimonials.name: Bill W.
testimonials.text: Clayton and the crew exceeded our expectations with their work ethic and attention to detail. We couldn't be happier with the results after having our yard reseeded and overgrown trees replaced.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure design consultation. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest quote -- no obligations, just expert advice from a family that's been doing this for 50 years.

footer.description: Family-owned since 1976. Transforming outdoor spaces across northwest Ohio for nearly 50 years.
footer.service_area: Serving Bryan, Toledo, Defiance, Napoleon, Maumee & NW Ohio
